db.default_data: 宁波景驰进出口有限公司
db.name: wfgs

view.params:
SELECT  wfgs.SID,wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT kh.SID,kh.company_name
FROM kh
ORDER BY kh.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.bmjl
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.yhm=:yhm)
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(fysq.khh)
FROM fysq
WHERE   (fysq.cwgc=[费用申请.财务工厂])

SELECT DISTINCT(fysq.yhzh)
FROM fysq
WHERE   (fysq.cwgc=[费用申请.财务工厂])
   AND  (fysq.khh=[费用申请.开户银行])

SELECT top 2000 wxht.order_id
FROM wxht
WHERE (wxht.customer like "%"+ :customer  +"%") and  ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (wxht.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (wxht.sys_path LIKE :c_depart))) order by wxht.order_id

SELECT top 5000 cght.hthm
FROM cght where (cght.xjht="新") and ((cght.cgsh="1") or (cght.sfhz="通过")) order by cght.hthm

SELECT cghtsheet.SID,cghtsheet.bjhh
FROM cght,cghtsheet
WHERE   (cght.SID=cghtsheet.PID)
   AND  (cght.hthm=:hthm)
ORDER BY cghtsheet.SID ASC

SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT hbdm.SID,hbdm.hhl
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT zx.SID,zx.mc
FROM zx
WHERE  (zx.ly="费用类型")
ORDER BY zx.SID ASC

SELECT zx.mc
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="付款形式")

SELECT top 1 kpnr.tjhl
FROM kpnr where kpnr.tjhl>0

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao

SELECT qydd.ywmc,qydd.SID
FROM qydd
ORDER BY qydd.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao

SELECT shsc.SID,shsc.mc
FROM shsc
ORDER BY shsc.SID ASC

是
否

SELECT zxtc.SID,zxtc.company_name
FROM zxtc
WHERE   (zxtc.xbsq=:xbsq)
ORDER BY zxtc.SID ASC

SELECT cyzglsheet.SID,cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzgl,cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzgl.SID=cyzglsheet.PID)
   AND  (cyzglsheet.zm="工厂认证")
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.SID ASC

SELECT sys_users.name
FROM sys_users
WHERE   (sys_users.position like "%风审%")

SELECT top 5000 cght.hthm
FROM cght
WHERE   (cght.sccj1 like "%"+ :sccj1  +"%") and (cght.xjht="新") and ((cght.cgsh="1") or (cght.sfhz="通过"))
ORDER BY cght.SID desc

SELECT zx.wb1
FROM zx
WHERE  (zx.ly="费用类型") and (zx.mc=:mc)
ORDER BY zx.SID ASC

是
否

SELECT cnshengf.zwmc,cnshengf.SID
FROM cnshengf
ORDER BY cnshengf.SID ASC

SELECT wxhtsheet.cpbh,wxhtsheet.SID
FROM wxht,wxhtsheet
WHERE   (wxht.order_id=:order_id)
   AND  (wxht.SID=wxhtsheet.PID)
    AND CheckRole('外销合同')
ORDER BY wxhtsheet.SID ASC

SELECT cply.cply
FROM cply

SELECT wxht.order_id,wxht.SID
FROM wxht
WHERE   (wxht.customer=:customer)
  
ORDER BY wxht.SID ASC

SELECT wxhtsheet.order_id
FROM wxhtsheet
WHERE  (wxhtsheet.khmc=:customer)
   AND  (wxhtsheet.bjpath LIKE :c_depart)
  group by wxhtsheet.order_id

SELECT wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs

SELECT wbyhzl.SID,wbyhzl.zwmc
FROM wbyhzl
ORDER BY wbyhzl.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.fysp
FROM ywrybiao where (ywrybiao.fysp<>"") and (ywrybiao.fysp is not null) group by ywrybiao.fysp
ORDER BY ywrybiao.fysp ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.spbm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.fysp=:fysp)
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE (ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%"  ) or (ywrybiao.zw like "%外销%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT hbdm.hbdm,hbdm.SID
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs

SELECT ywrybiao.bmjl
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.yhm=:yhm)

SELECT zx.cs
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="增值税率")

SELECT DISTINCT(zx.wb2)
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="付款审批") and (zx.wb1 like "%"+ :web1  +"%")

通过
不通过
待审批

SELECT DISTINCT(zx.wb3)
FROM zx
WHERE    (zx.ly="付款审批")

SELECT hbdm.SID,hbdm.hbdm
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT cyzglsheet.SID,cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzgl,cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzgl.SID=cyzglsheet.PID)
   AND  (cyzglsheet.zm="财务费用审批人员")
   AND  (cyzglsheet.bz=:bz)
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.SID ASC

SELECT cyzglsheet.SID,cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzgl,cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzgl.SID=cyzglsheet.PID)
   AND  (cyzglsheet.zm="工厂认证")
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.SID ASC

SELECT huoguixh.mc,huoguixh.SID
FROM huoguixh
ORDER BY huoguixh.SID ASC

SELECT cymx.fphm,cymx.SID
FROM cymx
WHERE   ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (cymx.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (cymx.sys_path like :c_depart)))
ORDER BY cymx.SID ASC
